mapper.insert: INSERT INTO holdings (user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, avg_buy_price, currency) VALUES (#{userId}, #{accountId}, #{stockCode}, #{quantity}, #{avgBuyPrice}, #{currency})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, account_id, stock_code, quantity, avg_buy_price, currency, created_at, updated_at FROM holdings WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND quantity > 0 ORDER BY id
